{{Infobox character
| name = Sword Disciple
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Sword Disciple]] is a young girl who has killed six [[Irons]] and incapacitated nearly forty others.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16">''Unsouled'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Sword Disciple]] is a girl.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Sword Disciple]] is potentially the disciple of a [[Gold stage]] expert.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
